title: PAN in Form 16 does not match filing PAN — authenticity failure (blocking)

expected_output.user_action: The Form 16 you uploaded belongs to a different taxpayer (PAN XYZAB9999Z). Please upload the correct Form 16 for PAN ABCDE1234F.

notes: A PAN mismatch in Form 16 means the wrong document was uploaded — this is a blocking failure. The pipeline cannot proceed because we do not know whose income is in this Form 16. Confidence band drops to E and the taxpayer is asked to re-upload.
